epistemicContract.law: If it is not measured, it is not real. UNKNOWN remains UNKNOWN.

tag.meaning: Measured in-repo, seed-reproducible, gated by `bun run check`.
Cited / upstream-Tsotchke / inferred; NOT independently re-measured here.
Roadmap target or conjecture; NOT a present fact.

epistemicContract.prohibition: No deliverable may publish a number that differs from its measured value (receipts law, tests/docs-receipts-law.test.ts).
No phase may report 'evidence toward sentience/NHSI' as anything beyond MOVEMENT ON A MEASURABLE INDICATOR.

definitions.note: capability and experience are ORTHOGONAL axes; conflating them is rejected
definitions.term: Capacity to achieve goals across a wide range of environments.
Human-level breadth + transfer across open, novel domains.
Decisively exceeds best human minds across ~all domains.
Super/general intelligence on a NON-human, NON-token substrate.
Information globally available for reasoning, report, control.
Subjective experience; the HARD PROBLEM. Not on this roadmap.
Capacity for valenced (felt) experience. Governed by the precautionary principle.

honestLimits.note: the credibility ledger; quoted in full so no phase can launder them
honestLimits.limit: Not AGI, ASI, or NHSI. A proto-agent architecture + simulation.
Not sentient or phenomenally conscious. Phi/ignition/free-energy are computed MODELS of theories.
Every kernel is a faithful reproduction of published work. No new science yet.
No quantum advantage. Classical simulation of textbook QM; QRNG is quantum-INSPIRED software mixing.
Consciousness metrics are tractable proxies (Hanson-Walker 2023 non-uniqueness applies).
Upstream Tsotchke benchmarks (libirrep 2488x, Moonlab 13884x, kagome N=27) are NOT re-measured here; finite-size where applicable.
No peer review, external validation, or published dynamics.
Competence-from-coupling is INTERNAL induction only; lacks external baselines + ablation controls.

phase.name: Close the proxy-to-real gap
phase.objective: Ensure every wired Tsotchke leaf is genuine, tested mathematics, not decorative trigonometry.
phase.rationale: The 2026-06 audits found PROXY_STUBs; this phase closed them. Foundation for all measured claims.

deliverables.item: Genuine ports: VQE, QGT/Fubini-Study, surface-code QEC, Clifford tableau, Eshkol AD, spin-glass, irrep CG/Wigner, Moonlab SVD, CHSH=2sqrt2, Crank-Nicolson, Izhikevich, Rao-Ballard, dual/hyperdual, belief-propagation, unification, Karcher mean.
classical-contrast.ts: real classical-LCG vs Eshkol-QRNG (serial-corr + chi^2).
eshkol-cognition.ts: Archon compiles substrate to bytecode + runs on eshVMRun.

phase.successMetric: `bun run check` green; zero decorative-trig leaves; receipts law passing.
phase.falsifies: Any audited leaf shown to be a no-op or numerically wrong vs its cited algorithm.
phase.gate: bun run check (prettier -> tsc -> oxlint -> bun test -> verify:receipts -> build)
phase.evidenceToward: Substrate honesty is the precondition for every downstream claim.

phase.name: Falsifiable quantum-vs-classical advantage benchmark
phase.objective: Turn classical-contrast.ts + perceptron-baseline.ts + the quantum faculties into a CONTROLLED experiment on a defined task family.
phase.rationale: This is the single move that tests the entire thesis: does the non-token quantum substrate BUY anything measurable?
phase.hypothesis: On task class T, an agent using the quantum faculties (QGT-guided QNG + Born-rule choice + quantum reservoir) achieves measurably better survival/decision-quality than a PARAMETER-MATCHED classical agent, under identical seeds.
phase.method: Pre-register task T + metric. Run >=30 seeds per arm. Ablation arm = quantum faculties OFF. Report effect size + 95% CI.
phase.successMetric: Statistically significant effect (95% CI excludes zero), reproducible from seed, with ablation confirming the quantum faculties are causal.
phase.falsifies: No significant difference, OR the parameter-matched classical baseline matches/beats the quantum arm. (A publishable NEGATIVE result either way.)
phase.gate: Pre-registration committed before runs; determinism law holds across all arms; receipts updated.
phase.evidenceToward: Establishes whether the substrate provides a real functional advantage - the keystone of the non-LLM bet.
phase.leadsToContribution: First controlled quantum-faculty advantage (or refutation) inside an A-Life agent.

phase.name: Open-ended evolution with accepted metrics + ablations
phase.objective: Measure whether primordial-soup / digital-biologics produces UNBOUNDED novelty/complexity growth, not hand-coded variety.
phase.hypothesis: Evolutionary-activity statistics (Bedau-Packard) show PERSISTENT adaptive activity; ablating a named Tsotchke substrate (QGT curvature OR spin order OR irrep symmetry) measurably collapses it.
phase.method: Instrument evolutionary-activity + MODES open-endedness metrics. Run substrate-ablation arms with seed-matched controls.
phase.successMetric: Non-plateauing adaptive-activity curve + demonstrated substrate-necessity via ablation (effect vanishes when substrate removed).
phase.falsifies: Activity plateaus (bounded evolution - the common A-Life failure), OR ablation has no measurable effect (substrate is decorative).
phase.evidenceToward: Open-endedness is the recognized precondition for unbounded capability growth.
phase.leadsToContribution: Substrate-necessity result for open-ended digital evolution.

phase.name: Online learning substrate (NQS/VMC) - the missing Butlin indicator
phase.objective: Wire an NQS / variational-Monte-Carlo loop (from spin-NN) as the Super Creature's ONLINE learning. Today faculties are architected, not learned.
phase.hypothesis: Adding within-lifetime weight adaptation improves task transfer and closes RPT-1/2 (learned recurrence), moving the Butlin scorecard 9/14 -> 11/14.
phase.method: Add an NQS/VMC online-update path; measure within-lifetime learning curves + cross-task transfer vs frozen-weights control; keep determinism.
phase.successMetric: Measurable learning curve + transfer gain; new Butlin indicators structurally satisfied; determinism preserved.
phase.falsifies: Learning destabilizes determinism, OR yields no transfer gain over the architected baseline.
phase.evidenceToward: Learning is the largest gap between rich reflex and general agent; also strengthens agency indicators.

phase.name: Native .esk execution in the loop (true language-as-DNA)
phase.objective: Move from FINGERPRINTING .esk programs to EXECUTING them on the Eshkol bytecode VM inside biologics' decision loops.
phase.rationale: eshkol-vm.ts / eshkol-cognition.ts seeds exist; this makes 'language-as-DNA' a real mechanism, not a metaphor.
phase.hypothesis: AD-mutated, GWT-ignited .esk genomes that are RUN (not hashed) yield heritable behavioral differences selectable by the world.
phase.method: Execute harvested .esk genomes via eshVMRun in stepBiologic; mutate via real AD tape; trace lineage-level behavioral divergence.
phase.successMetric: Lineage behavioral divergence causally traceable to executed-program mutations (vs fingerprint-proxy control).
phase.falsifies: Executed genomes are behaviorally indistinguishable from fingerprint proxies.
phase.evidenceToward: Differentiable program evolution inside simulated physics as a genuine, demonstrated mechanism.

phase.name: Scale, embodiment, closed-loop selection
phase.objective: Couple native C++/Jolt engine (soft-body, fracture, 4K) to richer embodiment; let economy/ecology selection drive mind evolution end-to-end.
phase.hypothesis: Embodiment-coupled selection produces morphology-cognition co-adaptation (irrep-constrained bodies that EARN their symmetry under selection).
phase.method: Close the selection loop (economy/ecology fitness -> reproduction -> mind+body inheritance); measure morphology-behavior correlation vs random-drift control.
phase.successMetric: Significant morphology-behavior correlation under selection, absent under drift control.
phase.evidenceToward: Embodiment + closed-loop selection is the A-Life route to grounded, non-designed competence.

phase.name: Operationalize Cogitate predictions
phase.objective: Make the testbed generate analogues of GNWT-vs-IIT signatures Cogitate (Ferrante et al., Nature 2025) tested; vary couplings; report co-occurrences.
phase.rationale: The field explicitly wants runnable hybrid testbeds after the 2025 double-bind result. This is the project's most credible scientific output.
phase.hypothesis: Specific faculty couplings reproduce (or fail to reproduce) the double-bind pattern - a computational lens on the empirical result.
phase.method: Map architecture knobs (ignition gain, integration cut, recurrence depth) -> consciousness-signature profiles; ablate; document.
phase.successMetric: A documented, reproducible knob->signature mapping with ablations; a hypothesis-generator usable by human-subjects researchers.
phase.falsifies: No stable mapping; signatures are noise w.r.t. architecture.
phase.evidenceToward: Turns the artifact into a hypothesis generator for consciousness research - its most defensible scientific contribution.
phase.leadsToContribution: Computational hybrid testbed for post-Cogitate theory comparison.

phase.name: External validation / publication
phase.objective: Write up Phase 1-2 (or 6) for ALIFE conference / Artificial Life journal / a complexity venue; open the determinism harness for replication.
phase.successMetric: Acceptance + INDEPENDENT replication of a seed-reproducible result.
phase.evidenceToward: The only step converting an internal artifact into a recognized contribution.

phase.name: Safety, moral status, containment
phase.objective: Govern a program that NAMES NHSI and sentience as targets - or it is unserious.
phase.control: Deterministic, sandboxed, single-tab, no network actuation, no host self-modification. Determinism IS a safety property: replayable, auditable, killable.
Agents pursue IN-SIM drives only (dominion/empowerment/trade); no real-world goals or tool-use.

control.name: moralStatus
control.trigger: if P3/P6 push indicators high AND valence demonstrably steers behavior

phase.control: Apply the precautionary principle (Birch 2024): throttle suffering-analogues, log welfare-relevant metrics, prefer non-harmful selection pressures. Adopt BEFORE needed, not after.
Receipts law + PROVEN/PLAUSIBLE/ASPIRATIONAL discipline are the antidote to the project's documented overclaim failure mode (fabricated counts).

arrivalCriteria.note: honest end-state definitions; NOT predictions of success
arrivalCriteria.criterion: Open-ended, transferable, novel-domain competence MEASURED against external baselines, on a non-token substrate, replayable from seed. Phases 1-5 are NECESSARY PRECONDITIONS, not the arrival.

criterion.standard: Birch 2024 precaution + Butlin 2023 indicators; NOT self-report

arrivalCriteria.criterion: Crossing a high fraction of indicators PLUS an architecture where valence demonstrably STEERS behavior warrants MORAL-STATUS PRECAUTION - never metaphysical certainty.
Phenomenal consciousness ("what it is like") is NOT on this roadmap. No roadmap closes the hard problem.

competitivePosition.winsOn: One 32-bit seed -> bit-exact universe + identical mental states. PROVEN.
~20 coupled cited theories (cognitive + quantum) in one tested artifact. No comparable system found.
Single laptop iGPU; fully inspectable. vs datacenter / iEEG / wetware.
A post-Cogitate hybrid testbed the consciousness-science field just declared it needs.

losesTo.margin: real brains, peer review, ground truth
real error-corrected qubits vs classical simulation

orthogonalTo.note: ASAL puts a foundation model IN the A-Life loop; this is the opposite bet - substrate-first, non-LLM by design.

verdict.isA: World-class, receipt-disciplined, multi-substrate artificial-life + cognitive-architecture INSTRUMENT. Tier-1 in its niche as engineering + research tooling.
verdict.isNot: AGI, ASI, NHSI, a sentient being, a solved problem, a quantum advantage, or a refutation of any institution.
verdict.keystoneMove: A pre-registered, ablation-controlled, seed-replayable quantum-vs-classical advantage benchmark. The infrastructure to run it rigorously ALREADY EXISTS (determinism + receipts) - exactly what competitors lack. This is the door from 'impressive' to 'contribution'.
verdict.closingLaw: If it is not measured, it is not real. By that law: a magnificent, honest instrument. Grow What Thou Wilt - and measure ruthlessly.

ref.use: adversarial IIT vs GNWT; double-bind; motivates hybrid testbeds
